_note: Curated inputs for the one-time World Cup history generator (scripts/gen-wc-history.mjs -> public/data/wc-history.json). Finishes and non-participation reasons are scraped from each team's English Wikipedia 'Competitive record' table; match stats come from results.csv. Only two things are curated here: (1) the host of each tournament, and (2) each team's Wikipedia page title. hosts: a FIFA code, "CODE,CODE" for co-hosts, or {code, name?, flag?} to override the display name (West Germany) or flag (the 1861-1946 Italian flag). Frozen data, NOT refreshed by update.mjs.

USA.wiki: United States men's national soccer team
